tasks.subject: Task 0: Write merged prd-tier1.json
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Produce the single PRD file with test stories (priority 1-5) and implementation stories (priority 10-22)

**Files:**
- Modify: `prd-tier1.json`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] US-T00 through US-T04 present with priorities 1-5
- [ ] US-001 through US-012, US-014 present with priorities 10-22
- [ ] US-013 removed
- [ ] Each implementation story has test-mapping acceptance criterion added
- [ ] JSON is valid

**Verify:** `node -e "JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync('prd-tier1.json','utf8')); console.log('valid')"` → valid

```json:metadata
{"files": ["prd-tier1.json"], "verifyCommand": "node -e \"JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync('prd-tier1.json','utf8')); console.log('valid')\"", "acceptanceCriteria": ["test stories priority 1-5", "impl stories priority 10-22", "US-013 removed", "test mapping ACs added", "valid JSON"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 1: Update PROMPT_build.md
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add test-first instruction to the build prompt telling the agent to treat e2e/ as read-only during implementation

**Files:**
- Modify: `files/PROMPT_build.md`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Build prompt includes instruction to run test commands from acceptance criteria
- [ ] Build prompt includes instruction to NOT modify e2e/ files

**Verify:** `grep -c 'e2e/' files/PROMPT_build.md` → at least 1

```json:metadata
{"files": ["files/PROMPT_build.md"], "verifyCommand": "grep -c 'e2e/' files/PROMPT_build.md", "acceptanceCriteria": ["test-first instruction added", "e2e read-only instruction"]}
```
